title: Aggregate sum across a has_many join
prompt: Write `MyApp.Shop.total_spend_per_user/0` that joins users with their orders, groups by user id, and selects `{u.id, u.name, sum(o.total)}`. Use coalesce with 0 for users with no orders (`coalesce(sum(o.total), 0)`). Write to `lib/my_app/shop.ex`.
tier_rationale: Canonical sum-with-coalesce pattern; easy once the user has seen the idiom.
